description: A source watchlist plus recent working-paper signals for market-design, prediction-market, derivative-design, financial-innovation, and market-microstructure ideas. Historical lineage explains where built markets came from; recent signals show where new infrastructure and unbuilt-market candidates may emerge.

recent_signals.title: Kalshi and the Rise of Macro Markets
recent_signals.authors: Anthony M. Diercks, Jared Dean Katz & Jonathan H. Wright
recent_signals.signal: Event contracts are becoming real-time macro expectation instruments, not just political forecasting toys.
recent_signals.map_implication: Watch for macro-event data vendors, macro contract indices, and regulated event-contract analytics.

recent_signals.title: Price Discovery and Trading in Modern Prediction Markets
recent_signals.authors: Hunter Ng, Lin Peng, Yubo Tao & Dexin Zhou
recent_signals.signal: Common contracts across Polymarket, Kalshi, PredictIt, and Robinhood show price disparities and platform-specific lead-lag effects.
recent_signals.map_implication: Supports the prediction-market connectivity, routing, and cross-venue data cells.

recent_signals.title: What Happens When Institutional Liquidity Enters Prediction Markets
recent_signals.signal: Prediction markets are moving into an electronically intermediated microstructure regime.
recent_signals.map_implication: Look for market-making, prime brokerage, maker incentives, and execution analytics businesses.

recent_signals.title: Unlocking the Forecasting Economy: A Suite of Datasets for the Full Lifecycle of Prediction Market
recent_signals.signal: Prediction-market data is fragmented across metadata, trading events, oracle interactions, disputes, and settlement.
recent_signals.map_implication: Supports the neutral event-data vendor and lifecycle data-integration opportunity.

recent_signals.title: Can Interest-Bearing Positions Solve the Long-Horizon Problem in Prediction Markets?
recent_signals.signal: Interest on open positions may mitigate long-horizon liquidity and accuracy problems.
recent_signals.map_implication: Look for collateral yield, margin, and capital-efficiency infrastructure around event contracts.

recent_signals.title: A Microstructure Perspective on Prediction Markets
recent_signals.signal: Event-contract liquidity provision may look more like underwriting terminal outcome risk than classic spread capture.
recent_signals.map_implication: Screen for specialized risk engines, maker tooling, and event-contract clearing primitives.
